name: Mint Christmas
short_description: Get ready for a festive fun match 3 game. Featuring 2 exciting modes including a 12 round collection mode where you must get all the presents out of the grid before time runs out. Collect powerups and maybe you'll get extra time or perhaps a bomb to keep things moving. Can you beat all 12 rounds?
detailed_description: Get ready for a festive fun match 3 game. Featuring two exciting modes including a 12 round collection mode where you must get all the presents out of the grid and over to the tree before the time runs out. Match the snow to create powerups. Maybe you'll get extra time or perhaps a bomb to help keep things moving. Can you beat all 12 rounds. The scoreboards await. Happy Christmas!
about_the_game: Get ready for a festive fun match 3 game. Featuring two exciting modes including a 12 round collection mode where you must get all the presents out of the grid and over to the tree before the time runs out. Match the snow to create powerups.
